locations.name: 东非

locations.name: 赞比西河
locations.summary: 赞比西河或譯三比西河（英語：Zambezi River）是非洲第四长的河流，也是从非洲大陆流入印度洋的最长河流，当地方言意为“巨大的河流”。 赞比西河是非洲南部的大河，源于赞比亚西北部，距刚果河的源头约1千米；河流上游有一部分經過安哥拉，…

locations.name: 科摩罗群岛

relations.subject: Olive bee-eater
relations.evidence: The olive bee-eater is found in the grassland and coastal mountain forests of East Africa and Madagascar, and an isolated population can be found in coastal Angola. There are two subspecies; M

relations.subject: Olive bee-eater
relations.evidence: superciliosus occurs in eastern Ethiopia, Somalia and Kenya, and southwards through East Africa to southern Mozambique and the Zambezi Valley, as well as the Comoro Islands and Madagascar; M
